title: Right Now Is Enough
subtitle: An affirmation for settling into the present moment at bedtime
excerpt: A short affirmation for Day 8 of the sleep arc. It names the present moment as complete — not lacking, not requiring action, not needing to be different from what it is.
sourceNotes: Day 8 theme from SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798269649795).

practice.whenToUse: When lying in bed with a mind that keeps reaching toward what's next — when now feels insufficient or incomplete.

content.text: An affirmation for Day 8. It names the present moment as enough — not as a motivational statement but as a plain fact. This moment has everything it needs to be itself.
Right now is enough. I am in the right place. I can rest here.
Say it three times, lying down or sitting up — whichever you're doing when the mind starts reaching. Slow. No rush to the next thought. Let the third repetition be quieter than the first.
(Rebecca J Page, 2025). The affirmation is adapted from the Day 8 reframe lines.
